title: Callista lasioglossa
intro: Callista lasioglossa, also known as the "Tongkat Ali", is a type of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to Southeast Asia and commonly used in traditional medicine. The plant has been valued for its potential health benefits, including its ability to boost testosterone levels, improve mood, and enhance physical performance, as well as its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Callista lasioglossa include a range of compounds, including eurycomanone, eurycomanol, and eurycomanin, which are believed to contribute to the plant's medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Callista lasioglossa is often made into herbal preparations, such as capsules, teas, and tonics, which are used to support male reproductive health and enhance overall well-being.
